# HISNUL MUSLIM

This package provides **Gold Standard**, research-grade data for the Islamic litany: **hisnul muslim**.

## Quality Standards

- **Sanitized Arabic**: Normalized NFKC text, free of presentation forms.
- **Academic Transliteration**: Professional phonetic mapping with shadda doubling.
- **Research Calibre**: Metadata scrubbed and validated for publication.
- **ESM Certified**: Built for modern Node.js and Browser environments.

## Integration

```bash
npm install @kazishariar/hisnul-muslim-data
```

```javascript
import { getMeta, getData } from '@kazishariar/hisnul-muslim-data';
const meta = getMeta();
const data = getData();
```
